sections: Canonical artifacts, renderer-derived views, and Projections
Stable semantics and configurable language through Vocabulary model
Canonical artifact identities through Vocabulary rows
Project posture kernel and recommendation contracts

repo_truth: Live Rust still uses a fixed CanonicalArtifactKind/layout and Markdown-canonical authoring paths, with typed YAML input validation and deterministic renderers as useful precursors. Generic schema-registry, kind/instance, intake/promotion, vocabulary, and posture-kernel runtime contracts are not implemented. The complete final HCM-0.2 documentation subject updates only control-pack documents 00, 01, 02, 03, 05, and 06; 04 remains included as slice-boundary authority. Runtime program gates remain open and no Rust file changed.
allowed_scope: Read the exact authority sections and replay every entry in subject_manifest against the live repository.
Review the complete post-remediation HCM-0.2 semantic freeze and coupled proof/regression update read-only.
Run read-only YAML-example, link, terminology, field-matrix, archive, handoff-validator, changed-path, GitNexus, and whitespace checks.
non_goals: No Rust/runtime implementation, shipped default-set selection, HCM-0.3 Resolution/Snapshot freeze, CLI/Tauri/Substrate/dock work, or runtime proof-gate promotion.
No edits, commits, global handoff, ledger write, new dispatch, or user task hop by the reviewer.
Do not rely on parent implementation reasoning or treat examples as approved shipped defaults.
tasks: Independently verify HCM-0.2 authority and dependency boundaries from live files.
Check that every in-scope authored and derived field has an unambiguous owner/authority, default or omission rule, validation rule, and explicit non-goal.
Check stable-role versus semantic-capability namespaces and exact capability conformance bindings across profiles, kinds, instances, vocabulary, dependencies, and constitutional-root selection.

Check single-parent replace-whole profile layering, omitted-versus-empty/null behavior, exact invocation selection, conflict refusal, resolved layer decisions, and complete deterministic fingerprint inputs.
Check exact capability-contract dependency resolution, the complete v1 cardinality enum/count semantics, provider ordering/ambiguity refusal, and kind capability uniqueness.

Check that every v1 intake coverage item has non-empty candidate-field mappings, immutable intake/candidate/approval/promotion lineage, trigger-to-coverage reassessment mappings, compare-and-write promotion, and constitutional Charter authority.

Check posture kernel/recommendation/transition ref-fingerprint replay, normalization, freshness, linked policy notification conformance, bounded signals, constitutional-root-only mutation, resulting-kernel proof, reassessment, and stale/override refusal.

Verify examples parse and cross-link semantically, shipped defaults remain reserved to HCM-0.6, live precursors remain accurately classified, all runtime gates remain open, and no sibling-slice scope was widened.

Return findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit. Every finding must include severity, file/line, violated contract or gate, why it is wrong, smallest valid remediation, and missing verification. Return CLEAN only if no actionable finding remains.
contracts_and_gates: 05 HCM-0.2 frozen design contracts and per-field matrices
stop_conditions: Return blocked if required authority, subject files, or validation infrastructure are unavailable.
Return a Required finding rather than choosing any shipped default or widening into HCM-0.3+.
Do not modify repository state or write orchestration artifacts.
